literature_expectation.expected_transport_trend: Different targets on the same ring should not be treated as equivalent, because the target changes the coherent pathways.
literature_expectation.expected_role_of_disorder: Higher irregularity should lower the absolute arrival, but may also make weak phase scrambling more useful for unfavorable targets.
literature_expectation.expected_role_of_phase_scrambling: Targets that are coherent-friendly should stay close to the zero-scrambling optimum; unfavorable targets may need a nonzero optimum.
literature_expectation.expected_failure_mode: If all targets collapse to the same behavior, target placement is not acting as a first-order variable in this setup.
